commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=4958044d010f43fee4ee8796308f8349e68c504b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `data-run-history` target to the cron Run history card and scrolls that card into view after the History button loads runs.

PR surface: Source +3. Total +3 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run. Source inspection shows the plausible path: the History button only calls `onLoadRuns`, while the Run history card can sit lower on the page below the job list.
commands.review_followup: A contributor or maintainer needs to fix the guarded DOM call and add real browser proof; this should not be sent to an automated repair lane while proof is missing.

target.title: fix: scroll Run history card into view on History button click (#59902)
target.author: dwc1997

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
